summary: When an input name like packed_params is auto-camelized in generated AscendC code, the inferred dtype macro may not exist. Rename auxiliary inputs to a simple template-friendly name such as weight and update the kernel queue/global tensor types to the matching DTYPE_WEIGHT macro.
